description: 3D model assets for ForgeFlow Games pipeline (all CC0)

ultimate-monsters.use: ARPG enemies, RPG monsters, platformer bosses

modular-dungeon.needs_conversion: FBX to GLB via Three.js FBXLoader or Blender CLI
modular-dungeon.use: ARPG dungeon environments — walls, floors, doors, chests, torches, traps

base-characters.use: Player hero characters — rigged humanoids with customizable hairstyles
base-characters.notes: Compatible with Mixamo animations. Rigged with standard humanoid skeleton.

medieval-weapons.use: ARPG loot drops — swords, axes, shields, bows, staffs

pipeline_notes.gltf_loading: Use Three.js GLTFLoader for .gltf/.glb files directly
pipeline_notes.fbx_loading: Use Three.js FBXLoader for .fbx files (heavier but works)
pipeline_notes.conversion: For best performance, convert FBX to GLB using Blender CLI batch script
pipeline_notes.animations: Monster GLBs have embedded animations. Character models need Mixamo animations applied.
